justification: The diff correctly updates the JDK version in CI and pom.xml to 21, and upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3.13 which requires Java 17+ (compatible with 21). It also updates the MySQL connector artifact ID to the modern 'mysql-connector-j' and adds JUnit Jupiter. However, there is no Java source code change to demonstrate idiomatic Java 21 usage (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is limited. The diff is coherent with no spurious changes.
